positive: A complex, symmetrical mandala composition featuring stylized nocturnal woodland creatures and luminous celestial elements. The central focus is a majestic crescent moon interwoven with deep indigo vines and delicate, glowing flora. Incorporate silhouettes of diverse animals (e.g., owl, fox, deer) rendered in solid black ink, framed by intricate Art Nouveau and Zentangle patterns. Use negative space dramatically. The color palette must be highly limited: deep indigo, muted midnight blue, rich gold metallic accents, and brilliant white glow. High contrast, highly detailed, perfect for direct screen printing on dark fabric. Vector art aesthetic, highly graphic, clean lines, central composition.
